name: academorix/caching
purpose: Attribute-driven cache composition substrate. Ships Cacheable/CacheEvict/CachePut attributes, tag builder, driver-capability guard, and resolver discovery.
capabilities: Driver-capability probe (TaggableCacheGuard) degrades to plain cache
Deterministic cache-key composer with argument bindings
when_to_use: Any package needs read-through caching, tag-based invalidation, or a deterministic key composer.
when_not_to_use: For tenant-aware tag resolution, layer academorix/scope or academorix/database on top.
